title: Moblin from Zelda: The Wind Waker
description: This resource pack replaces piglins brute by Moblins from Zelda: The Wind Waker.
body:
This resource pack replaces piglins brute by Moblins from Zelda: The Wind Waker.

Optifine (forge), or entity textures & models features is required (fabric)!


Custom sounds from Zelda: The Wind Waker are included
